title: tarenna borneensis
intro: Tarenna borneensis, also known as Borneo tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to Borneo and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tarenna borneensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Tarenna borneensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
